# FileHeadphone

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::FileHeadphone;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        FileHeadphone { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
music, audio, sound, headphones

## Categories
files
